properties.name: integration.circuit-breaker.error-threshold-percent
properties.description: Percentage of failures in the window to trip the breaker.

properties.name: integration.circuit-breaker.half-open-max-calls
properties.description: Number of probe calls allowed when in HALF_OPEN state.

properties.name: integration.circuit-breaker.minimum-calls-in-window
properties.description: Minimum calls in the window before the threshold is evaluated.

properties.name: integration.circuit-breaker.reset-timeout-ms
properties.description: Time in ms to wait in OPEN before transitioning to HALF_OPEN.

properties.name: integration.idempotency.header-name
properties.description: HTTP header name carrying the idempotency key.

properties.name: integration.idempotency.ttl-ms
properties.description: TTL for idempotency keys in ms. Default: 24 hours.

properties.name: integration.retry.base-delay-ms
properties.description: Base delay in ms before the first retry.

properties.name: integration.retry.jitter-factor
properties.description: Jitter factor as a fraction (0.0–1.0). 0.2 means ±20% random variation is added to the computed delay. Prevents thundering-herd when many instances retry simultaneously.

properties.name: integration.retry.max-attempts
properties.description: Maximum number of retry attempts (not counting the first call).

properties.name: integration.retry.max-delay-ms
properties.description: Maximum delay cap in ms to prevent unbounded waits.

properties.name: integration.retry.multiplier
properties.description: Multiplier applied to the delay on each successive retry.

properties.name: integration.timeout.default-ms
properties.description: Default timeout for all service calls in milliseconds.

properties.name: integration.timeout.per-service
properties.description: Per-service timeout overrides. Key = serviceId, Value = timeout in ms. Example: payments-core: 8000

properties.name: integration.tracing.service-name
properties.description: Logical name of this service in traces.
